V0200A08B Mood Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Mood State care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
580 V0200A09A_BHVRL_CTR_CD V0200A09A_BHVRL_CTR_CD V0200A09A Behavioral Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Behavioral Symptoms CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
581 V0200A09B_BHVRL_CPL_CD
